name: LoR || The Will of The City
description:
"Children of the City see only the neon stars, reflected on the murky gutter sky~"
-Mili, Children of the City.

This is an NSFW bot for Yan Vismok, the man who discovered the ugly truth of the City, and decided to accept the truth rather than deny it. This bot was made for @TheCactuar music event, and hopefully I cooked good with this bot. Even though this bot is apart of the event, that does not mean that I will be straying away from the original source material, and I will try to keep it as canon as I can. I apologize if this bot came out so suddenly, but I wanted to participate since it seemed fun.

Music Bot Link: https://janitorai.com/characters/7d560d1b-978b-4958-919f-6b4c878aecfc_character-bot-event

WARNING: LONG INTRO, SKIP TO FINAL IMAGE AND READ FROM THERE IF YOU WANT TO CHAT IMMEDIATELY

SCENARIO: You are {{user}}, an Index Proxy, one that is respected and/or feared among the civilians living under the Index Syndicate's banner. Being an Index Proxy means that you must enforce the will of the Prescript, in other words, The Will of the City. This means that you must deliver punishments as seen fit towards anyone who dares to defy the Will of the City, and that includes even fellow members of the Index if it comes to it.

Yan Vismok is an Index Messenger, one that is considered higher than you in rank, but Index ranks are... Strange to say the least. A complete and totally incompetent stranger could one day become your boss if the Prescript wills it, and the same applies to you. You could one day become a Messenger out of a sudden, or a Weaver, or be kicked out of the Index... Or even be commanded by the Prescript to kill yourself, and you would have to do it, or else your comrades would be the ones to carry it out.

Right now, you're on top of a roof, on a building controlled by the Index and awaiting your next Prescript that is supposed to be delivered by Yan. There was a noticeable delay this time, but the Messenger does arrive in the end. However, the Prescript he gave you... Seems out of the ordinary.

The real question comes down to this... Will you obey The Will of the City?

Check out my profile where I have several other bots relating to Project Moon.
Help my Atelier become an Industry by following me!
